title: Global chip makers announce new export rules affecting Asian suppliers
summary: Semiconductor export controls tighten as major producers coordinate new licensing requirements for advanced chips shipped to Asian markets.

title: Electronics manufacturers in Pune report component shortages
summary: Small and mid-size electronics firms in Maharashtra say imported chip components are harder to source, raising production costs.

title: Chip export licensing expands to more advanced nodes
summary: New semiconductor export licensing requirements now cover additional advanced chip categories, industry groups confirm.

title: Monsoon arrives early across western India
summary: The monsoon reached Maharashtra ahead of schedule, with heavy rain forecast for the coming week across Pune and Mumbai.

title: Pharma distributors warn of logistics delays during heavy rains
summary: Medicine supply chains in western India face short-term delays as distributors reroute deliveries around flooded corridors.

title: Central bank holds rates, signals patience on inflation
summary: The central bank kept interest rates unchanged, citing cooling inflation but persistent food price pressure.

title: Mutual fund inflows hit record high for sixth straight month
summary: Retail investors continued pouring money into equity mutual funds, extending a record streak of monthly inflows.

title: Semiconductor firms shift some assembly to India amid export rules
summary: Chip assembly and testing investment is moving toward India as companies diversify away from restricted supply routes.

title: Generic drug prices expected to rise on import cost pressure
summary: Pharmacy groups warn imported generic medicine ingredients are getting costlier, which may lift retail prices this quarter.

title: New solar manufacturing hub announced in Maharashtra
summary: State officials unveiled plans for a solar panel manufacturing hub near Pune, promising thousands of jobs.
